scripts.sync-cache: VERSION=$(node -p "require('../.claude-plugin/plugin.json').version") && CACHE=/home/vscode/.claude/plugins/cache/agentOW/agentOW/$VERSION && test -d $CACHE && cp -r ./dist/* $CACHE/ts/dist/ && cp -r ../agents/*.md $CACHE/agents/ && cp -r ../docs/*.md $CACHE/docs/ 2>/dev/null && cp -r ../skills/* $CACHE/skills/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p $CACHE/tools && cp -r ../tools/* $CACHE/tools/ 2>/dev/null; echo "cache synced to $CACHE"
